sentences.target: Je consacre ma matinée à ce dossier.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔ̃.sakʁ ma ma.ti.ne a sə dɔ.sje/

translations.fr: Je consacre ma matinée à ce dossier.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔ̃.sakʁ ma ma.ti.ne a sə dɔ.sje/
translations.en: I'm devoting my morning to this file.
translations.es: Dedico la mañana a este expediente.
translations.de: Ich widme den Vormittag dieser Akte.
translations.it: Dedico la mattinata a questo fascicolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把整个上午都用在这个文件上。
translations.yue: 我將成個上晝都用嚟處理呢份文件。
translations.ru: Я посвящаю этому делу всё утро.
translations.pt: Dedico a manhã a este dossiê.
translations.he: אני מקדיש את הבוקר לתיק הזה.
translations.vi: Tôi dành cả buổi sáng cho hồ sơ này.
translations.nl: Ik wijd mijn ochtend aan dit dossier.
translations.uk: Я присвячую свій ранок цій справі.
translations.hu: Erre az aktára szentelem a délelőttömet.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी सुबह इस फ़ाइल को समर्पित कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Αφιερώνω το πρωινό μου σε αυτόν τον φάκελο.
translations.nb: Jeg bruker formiddagen på denne saken.
translations.id: Saya mencurahkan pagi saya untuk berkas ini.
translations.sv: Jag ägnar min förmiddag åt det här ärendet.
translations.da: Jeg bruger min formiddag på denne sag.
translations.ja: 午前中はこの案件に専念します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct object and a prepositional complement.
Possessive determiner (PronType=Prs), feminine singular, agreeing with ‘matinée’; modifies the noun.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object (thing being devoted).
Preposition introducing the oblique/prepositional complement indicating target/beneficiary.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘dossier’.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘à’.

sentences.target: On va consacrer du temps à ça.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va kɔ̃.sakʁe dy tɑ̃ a sa/

translations.fr: On va consacrer du temps à ça.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va kɔ̃.sakʁe dy tɑ̃ a sa/
translations.en: We're going to devote some time to that.
translations.es: Vamos a dedicarle tiempo a eso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们会花点时间在这上面。
translations.yue: 我哋會花啲時間喺呢件事上面。
translations.pt: Vamos dedicar um tempo a isso.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sẽ dành chút thời gian cho việc đó.
translations.nl: We gaan daar wat tijd aan besteden.
translations.el: Θα αφιερώσουμε λίγο χρόνο σε αυτό.
translations.nb: Vi skal sette av litt tid til det.
translations.id: Kita akan meluangkan sedikit waktu untuk itu.
translations.sv: Vi ska lägga lite tid på det.
translations.ro: Vom dedica puțin timp pentru asta.
translations.da: Vi kommer til at bruge lidt tid på det.
translations.ja: それに少し時間を割くつもりです。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal/personal subject pronoun; grammatical subject (often meaning ‘we’ in colloquial French).
Auxiliary verb (futur proche), present indicative 3rd person singular, selecting an infinitive complement.
Infinitive main verb, complement of the auxiliary ‘va’.
Partitive article (fusion de + le), masculine singular; introduces a mass noun (‘temps’) as direct object.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number); direct object of ‘consacrer’.
Preposition introducing the oblique/prepositional complement.
Demonstrative pronoun; object of the preposition ‘à’.

sentences.target: Nous consacrons ce week-end au rangement.

translations.fr: Nous consacrons ce week-end au rangement.
translations.en: We're dedicating this weekend to tidying up.
translations.es: Dedicamos este fin de semana a ordenar.
translations.de: Dieses Wochenende widmen wir dem Aufräumen.
translations.it: Questo fine settimana lo dedichiamo al riordino.
translations.ko: 이번 주말은 정리하는 데 쓰기로 했어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这个周末我们用来收拾整理。
translations.yue: 我哋呢個週末會用嚟執拾。
translations.pt: Vamos dedicar este fim de semana à arrumação.
translations.he: אנחנו מקדישים את סוף השבוע הזה לסידור.
translations.vi: Cuối tuần này chúng tôi dành để dọn dẹp.
translations.ar: نكرّس عطلة نهاية هذا الأسبوع للترتيب.
translations.nl: Dit weekend wijden we aan opruimen.
translations.hi: हम इस सप्ताहांत को सफाई में लगाएंगे।
translations.el: Αυτό το Σαββατοκύριακο το αφιερώνουμε στο συμμάζεμα.
translations.nb: Denne helgen bruker vi på å rydde.
translations.id: Akhir pekan ini kami mencurahkan waktu untuk beres-beres.
translations.sv: Vi ägnar den här helgen åt att städa.
translations.da: Denne weekend bruger vi på at rydde op.
translations.ja: 今週末は片づけに充てます。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person plural; grammatical subject.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; takes a direct object and prepositional complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies ‘week-end’.
Common noun, masculine; direct object (period being devoted).
Preposition ‘à’ fused with definite article ‘le’ (à + le); introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’ indicating the purpose/activity.

sentences.target: Elle consacre tout son temps aux enfants.

translations.fr: Elle consacre tout son temps aux enfants.
translations.en: She devotes all her time to the kids.
translations.es: Ella dedica todo su tiempo a los niños.
translations.de: Sie widmet ihre ganze Zeit den Kindern.
translations.it: Dedica tutto il suo tempo ai bambini.
translations.zh-Hans: 她把全部时间都用在孩子们身上。
translations.yue: 佢將全部時間都用喺啲細路身上。
translations.ru: Она посвящает всё своё время детям.
translations.pt: Ela dedica todo o seu tempo às crianças.
translations.he: היא מקדישה את כל זמנה לילדים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy dành hết thời gian cho bọn trẻ.
translations.nl: Ze wijdt al haar tijd aan de kinderen.
translations.uk: Вона присвячує весь свій час дітям.
translations.hi: वह अपना सारा समय बच्चों को देती है।
translations.pl: Ona poświęca cały swój czas dzieciom.
translations.el: Αφιερώνει όλο τον χρόνο της στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Hun bruker all tiden sin på barna.
translations.id: Dia mendedikasikan seluruh waktunya untuk anak-anak.
translations.sv: Hon ägnar all sin tid åt barnen.
translations.ro: Ea își dedică tot timpul copiilor.
translations.da: Hun bruger al sin tid på børnene.
translations.ja: 彼女はすべての時間を子どもたちに捧げています。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; grammatical subject.
Main lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; governs a direct object and a prepositional complement.
Quantifier/determiner used as a predeterminer; intensifies the noun phrase (‘son temps’) to mean totality.
Possessive determiner (PronType=Prs), masculine singular; modifies ‘temps’ with 3rd person singular possessor.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number); direct object (thing being devoted).
Preposition ‘à’ fused with plural definite article ‘les’ (à + les); introduces the prepositional complement.
Common noun, masculine plural; object of the preposition ‘aux’, recipient of the devoted time.
